Kentucky permit page Portal-only

Louisville permit portal and PermitPulse coverage

Louisville is listed in the current PermitPulse jurisdiction catalog with portal-only coverage in Kentucky. Start with the official Online Permitting Portal portal, review the current coverage notes below, and use Mission Control when the permit record needs more context.
